mapper.sql: id, rule_name, rule_type, metric_name, threshold_value, comparison_operator, duration_seconds, severity, enabled, notify_channels, description, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_alert_rule (rule_name, rule_type, metric_name, threshold_value, comparison_operator, duration_seconds, severity, enabled, notify_channels, description, create_by) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{ruleType}, #{metricName}, #{thresholdValue}, #{comparisonOperator}, #{durationSeconds}, #{severity}, #{enabled}, #{notifyChannels}, #{description}, #{createBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_alert_rule SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, rule_type = #{ruleType}, metric_name = #{metricName}, threshold_value = #{thresholdValue}, comparison_operator = #{comparisonOperator}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, severity = #{severity}, enabled = #{enabled}, notify_channels = #{notifyChannels}, description = #{description}, update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_alert_rule WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_alert_rule WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM sys_alert_rule WHERE enabled = #{enabled} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM sys_alert_rule WHERE severity = #{severity} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM sys_alert_rule WHERE rule_name = #{ruleName} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_alert_rule SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_alert_rule WHERE deleted = 0
